title: Zero In Wasp Nest Killer Foam - 300 ml Aerosol, Controls Wasps and Their Nests in the Home and Garde & Fly and Wasp Killer - 300 ml Aerosol, Controls Flying Insects and Bugs in The Home
features: Product 1: ATTACK THE NEST: Effective wasp nest destroyer foam kills nuisance wasps at source in the nest
Product 1: EFFECTIVE: For best results, treat the entrance of wasp nests early in the morning or late in the evening when the wasps are less active
Product 1: VERSATILE: Suitable for use indoors, including roof spaces and wall cavities, as well as in outbuildings, sheds, and outdoor garden areas
Product 1: EFFECTIVE: 300 ml of wasp nest destroyer spray is sufficient for 2-3 treatments and can easily be applied up to a 2m distance from the nest
Product 2: FAST-ACTING: Fine mist aerosol Fly KIller spray kills wasps, flies, mosquitos, and other flying insects instantly by quickly paralysing, knocking them down in seconds

Product 2: VERSATILE: Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, effectively stopping wasps and flies from plaguing household areas like kitchens, conservatories, living areas and utility spaces, Also great for instant knockdown of troublesome insects outside in the garden or on the patio
Product 2: LOW ODOUR: Formulated for safe and effective use in home living areas leaving no lingering unpleasant smells and avoiding drips or stains on nearby furniture or fabrics
Product 2: EFFECTIVE: 5 second burst of Fly and Wasp Killer treats an average sized room (30 cubic metres) Or simply spray directly at bugs and flying insects from a distance of 60 to 90cm
description: Zero In Wasp Nest Killer Foam - 300 ml Aerosol, Controls Wasps and Their Nests in the Home and Garden, Ready-To-Use, Fast Action Formula Zero In Wasp Nest Destroyer Foam is an insecticidal foaming spray for killing wasps in the nest The nest should be treated late evening or early morning when the wasps are less active Contains sufficient foam for around 2-3 treatments DIRECTIONS FOR USE: Shake well before use Do not stand directly underneath the nest and wear suitable clothing should the wasps become active Keep the can upright and stand at least 2 metres from the nest Direct and spray the foam at the nest entrance Spray for 8 seconds to thoroughly wet the nest, paying attention to the entrance For larger nests, a 12 second burst of spray should be applied Stand well back from the treated area after application If the nest entrance is not visible, spray where the wasp activity is seen, such as through holes or gaps in walls etc If wasp activity is seen again after treatment, which is not unusual, repeat the application Zero in Fly and Wasp Killer - 300 ml Aerosol, Controls Flying Insects and Bugs in The Home, Ready-To-Use, Fast Action Formula, Instand Knockdown of Flies, Waps and Other Flying Insects Zero In Fly & Wasp Killer is a fast-acting spray that kills flies, wasps, mosquitoes and other flying insects on contact DIRECTIONS FOR USE: For quick knockdown, spray directly at insects from a distance of 60 to 90cm When treating a room, close all doors and windows and spray with a 5 second burst for an average size room (30 cubic metres) Leave for approx 10 minutes Ventilate room after treatment NOTE: Avoid direct contact with soft furnishings, carpet or polished surfaces Not for use on clothing or bedding
